requirement_topic.en: AC Connector — IEC 62196-2 Type 2 vs GB/T 20234.2 (Hardware Change Required)
requirement_topic.zh: 交流接口——IEC 62196-2 Type 2与GB/T 20234.2（须硬件改动）
requirement_topic.zht: 交流接口——IEC 62196-2 Type 2與GB/T 20234.2（須硬件改動）

summary.en: Brunei's EV charging infrastructure follows the IEC 62196 connector ecosystem, consistent with the ASEAN IEC-aligned path and Brunei's adoption of IEC-based electrical standards through the Department of Electrical Services. AC charging points in Brunei are expected to use the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) coupler — a 7-pin connector with proximity pilot (PP) and control pilot (CP) signaling. Type 2 is the dominant AC EV connector across IEC-aligned markets in Southeast Asia and the GCC. No confirmed Brunei-specific mandatory connector regulation has been published as of 2026-06, but IEC 62196 Type 2 is the expected ecosystem choice and is incompatible with GB/T 20234.2 connectors.
summary.zh: 文莱电动汽车充电基础设施遵循IEC 62196接口体系，与东盟IEC体系路径及文莱通过电气服务部采用IEC电气标准的惯例一致。文莱交流充电点预期采用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器——一种带接近导引（PP）和控制导引（CP）信号的7针接口。Type 2是东南亚和海湾合作委员会IEC体系市场的主流交流电动汽车接口。截至2026年6月，未发现文莱专门发布强制接口法规，但IEC 62196 Type 2是预期的生态选择，与GB/T 20234.2接口不兼容。
summary.zht: 汶萊電動汽車充電基礎設施遵循IEC 62196接口體系，與東盟IEC體系路徑及汶萊通過電氣服務部採用IEC電氣標準的慣例一致。汶萊交流充電點預期採用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器——一種帶接近導引（PP）和控制導引（CP）信號的7針接口。Type 2是東南亞和海灣合作委員會IEC體系市場的主流交流電動汽車接口。截至2026年6月，未發現汶萊專門發布強制接口法規，但IEC 62196 Type 2是預期的生態選擇，與GB/T 20234.2接口不兼容。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories (Type 2 / Mennekes 7-pin coupler)
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Mode 3 control pilot and proximity pilot signaling requirements
Department of Electrical Services (DES) — type approval or acceptance required for electrical equipment; no confirmed EV-connector-specific mandatory rule published as of 2026-06

summary.en: China AC chargers use the GB/T 20234.2 coupler. Although GB/T 20234.2 and IEC 62196-2 Type 2 have a similar overall size and pin count, they differ critically in connector gender (GB/T has male pins at the charger and female vehicle inlet; IEC 62196 Type 2 has female pins at the charger and male vehicle inlet), signaling protocol (CC/CP in GB/T versus PP/CP in IEC 62196), and contact configuration. The connectors are physically incompatible: a GB/T 20234.2 gun cannot be inserted into an IEC 62196-2 Type 2 vehicle inlet and vice versa.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2与IEC 62196-2 Type 2在整体尺寸和针数上相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公针、车辆端为母口；IEC 62196 Type 2充电桩端为母针、车辆端为公口）、信号协议（GB/T的CC/CP与IEC 62196的PP/CP）及触点配置上存在关键差异。两种接口在物理上不兼容：GB/T 20234.2充电枪无法插入IEC 62196-2 Type 2车辆接口，反之亦然。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2與IEC 62196-2 Type 2在整體尺寸和針數上相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公針、車輛端為母口；IEC 62196 Type 2充電樁端為母針、車輛端為公口）、信號協議（GB/T的CC/CP與IEC 62196的PP/CP）及觸點配置上存在關鍵差異。兩種接口在物理上不兼容：GB/T 20234.2充電槍無法插入IEC 62196-2 Type 2車輛接口，反之亦然。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — General requirements including CC/CP signaling for GB/T AC chargers

gap.en: A China GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler charger is not connector-compatible with Brunei IEC 62196-2 Type 2 vehicle inlets. Hardware redesign is required, covering: coupler assembly (male/female swap), locking mechanism, PP/CP pilot signaling circuit, cable assembly, temperature-rise evidence for the new coupler, and updated test reports. Cable adapters are not an accepted substitute for a compliant IEC 62196-2 Type 2 installation. Exporters must confirm the connector type required for the specific Brunei project, operator, or installation site before quoting.
gap.zh: 配备GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器的充电桩与文莱IEC 62196-2 Type 2车辆接口不兼容。须进行硬件重新设计，包括：耦合器组件（公/母互换）、锁止机构、PP/CP导引信号电路、电缆组件、新耦合器温升证据，以及更新测试报告。线缆转接器不能替代符合要求的IEC 62196-2 Type 2安装。出口商在报价前须确认具体文莱项目、运营商或安装场地所要求的接口类型。
gap.zht: 配備GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器的充電樁與汶萊IEC 62196-2 Type 2車輛接口不兼容。須進行硬件重新設計，包括：耦合器組件（公/母互換）、鎖止機構、PP/CP導引信號電路、電纜組件、新耦合器溫升證據，以及更新測試報告。線纜轉接器不能替代符合要求的IEC 62196-2 Type 2安裝。出口商在報價前須確認具體汶萊項目、運營商或安裝場地所要求的接口類型。

mandatory_status.target: Expected as IEC 62196 Type 2 ecosystem standard; no confirmed mandatory Brunei-specific connector regulation published as of 2026-06; DES type approval or acceptance coordination required; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234.2 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196-2 Type 2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] AC connector conversion from GB/T 20234.2 to IEC 62196-2 Type 2 is a hardware and signaling redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Brunei EV infrastructure follows the IEC 62196 ecosystem. GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and vice versa. Confirm the connector type with the Brunei importer and DES before committing to a project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 交流接口从GB/T 20234.2改为IEC 62196-2 Type 2是硬件和信号重新设计，而非文件替换。文莱电动汽车基础设施遵循IEC 62196体系。GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，反之亦然。在确定项目前须与文莱进口商和DES确认接口类型。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 交流接口從GB/T 20234.2改為IEC 62196-2 Type 2是硬件和信號重新設計，而非文件替換。汶萊電動汽車基礎設施遵循IEC 62196體系。GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，反之亦然。在確定項目前須與汶萊進口商和DES確認接口類型。

requirement_topic.en: DC Connector — IEC 62196-3 CCS2 vs GB/T 20234.3 (Physically Incompatible)
requirement_topic.zh: 直流接口——IEC 62196-3 CCS2与GB/T 20234.3（物理不兼容）
requirement_topic.zht: 直流接口——IEC 62196-3 CCS2與GB/T 20234.3（物理不兼容）

summary.en: For DC fast charging in Brunei, the IEC 62196-3 Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2, configuration FF) is the expected connector standard, consistent with the ASEAN IEC-aligned path and the global IEC DC fast-charging ecosystem. CCS2 combines the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 AC inlet with two additional DC power pins below, enabling both AC and DC charging through the same vehicle inlet. Communication between the DC charger and vehicle uses the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 protocol stack. No confirmed Brunei-specific mandatory DC connector regulation has been published as of 2026-06.
summary.zh: 文莱直流快充预期采用IEC 62196-3联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2，FF配置）作为接口标准，与东盟IEC体系路径及全球IEC直流快充生态一致。CCS2将IEC 62196-2 Type 2交流接口与其下方两个额外直流电力引脚组合，使车辆接口同时支持交流和直流充电。直流充电桩与车辆之间的通信采用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118协议栈。截至2026年6月，未发现文莱专门发布针对直流接口的强制法规。
summary.zht: 汶萊直流快充預期採用IEC 62196-3聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2，FF配置）作為接口標準，與東盟IEC體系路徑及全球IEC直流快充生態一致。CCS2將IEC 62196-2 Type 2交流接口與其下方兩個額外直流電力引腳組合，使車輛接口同時支持交流和直流充電。直流充電樁與車輛之間的通訊採用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118協議棧。截至2026年6月，未發現汶萊專門發布針對直流接口的強制法規。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers (CCS2 configuration FF)
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
ISO 15118 — Vehicle to grid communication interface (where applicable)

summary.en: China DC fast chargers use the GB/T 20234.3 coupler, a nine-pin configuration geometrically different from CCS2. GB/T 20234.3 uses a CAN bus communication protocol per GB/T 27930-2023 for charger-to-BMS communication, which is incompatible with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack used in CCS2 DC deployments. The two connectors are physically and electrically incompatible: they cannot be adapted by passive cable adapters.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器，该九针配置在几何形状上与CCS2不同。GB/T 20234.3采用CAN总线通信协议（GB/T 27930-2023）用于充电桩与电池管理系统通信，与CCS2直流部署所用的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。两种接口在物理和电气层面均不兼容，无法通过无源线缆转接器进行适配。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器，該九針配置在幾何形狀上與CCS2不同。GB/T 20234.3採用CAN總線通訊協議（GB/T 27930-2023）用於充電樁與電池管理系統通訊，與CCS2直流部署所用的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。兩種接口在物理和電氣層面均不兼容，無法通過無源線纜轉接器進行適配。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system (CAN bus, incompatible with IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118)

gap.en: A China GB/T 20234.3 DC charger cannot be deployed in a Brunei CCS2 installation. Conversion requires: coupler assembly redesign from GB/T 20234.3 to IEC 62196-3 CCS2; communication stack redesign from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118; firmware update; IEC 61851-23 accredited test evidence; updated temperature-rise and IP-rating evidence for the new coupler; and complete re-labelling. No passive adapter between GB/T 20234.3 and CCS2 is technically viable for public DC fast charging.
gap.zh: 配备GB/T 20234.3直流接口的充电桩无法在文莱CCS2安装中使用。转换须进行：耦合器组件从GB/T 20234.3重新设计为IEC 62196-3 CCS2；通信栈从GB/T 27930 CAN重新设计为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118；固件更新；IEC 61851-23认可测试证据；新耦合器温升和IP防护等级证据更新；以及完整重新贴标。对于公共直流快充，GB/T 20234.3与CCS2之间的被动转接器在技术上不可行。
gap.zht: 配備GB/T 20234.3直流接口的充電樁無法在汶萊CCS2安裝中使用。轉換須進行：耦合器組件從GB/T 20234.3重新設計為IEC 62196-3 CCS2；通訊棧從GB/T 27930 CAN重新設計為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118；固件更新；IEC 61851-23認可測試證據；新耦合器溫升和IP防護等級證據更新；以及完整重新貼標。對於公共直流快充，GB/T 20234.3與CCS2之間的被動轉接器在技術上不可行。

mandatory_status.target: Expected as IEC CCS2 ecosystem standard for DC fast charging; no confirmed mandatory Brunei-specific DC connector regulation published as of 2026-06; physical and protocol incompatibility with GB/T 20234.3 makes substitution impossible without hardware and firmware redesign
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234.3 conformity applies to China domestic DC connector design and is not a CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DC connector conversion from GB/T 20234.3 to IEC 62196-3 CCS2 requires both hardware redesign and communication-stack replacement. The connectors are physically incompatible and the protocols (GB/T 27930 CAN vs IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118) are incompatible. No passive adapter is viable for public DC fast-charging deployment in Brunei.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 直流接口从GB/T 20234.3改为IEC 62196-3 CCS2须同时进行硬件重新设计和通信栈替换。两种接口物理上不兼容，通信协议（GB/T 27930 CAN与IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）亦不兼容。对于文莱公共直流快充部署，被动转接器不可行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 直流接口從GB/T 20234.3改為IEC 62196-3 CCS2須同時進行硬件重新設計和通訊棧替換。兩種接口物理上不兼容，通訊協議（GB/T 27930 CAN與IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）亦不兼容。對於汶萊公共直流快充部署，被動轉接器不可行。

requirement_topic.en: Connector Certification / Type Approval — DES and NSC Acceptance in Brunei
requirement_topic.zh: 接口认证/型式认可——文莱DES和NSC认可
requirement_topic.zht: 接口認證/型式認可——汶萊DES和NSC認可

summary.en: Electrical equipment imported into Brunei, including EV charging connectors and EVSE assemblies, is subject to DES (Department of Electrical Services) type approval or acceptance as part of the electrical installation process. The Department of Standards Brunei (DSN, Jabatan Standard Brunei, under the Ministry of Finance and Economy) is the national standards body (referred to as NSC in some contexts) responsible for Brunei national standards. No confirmed dedicated EV-charger connector certification scheme under DSN/NSC has been identified as of 2026-06. Exporters should coordinate with DES and the local licensed electrical contractor to determine the applicable type approval or conformity documentation requirements for the specific charger type before import.
summary.zh: 进口至文莱的电气设备（包括电动汽车充电接口和EVSE整机）须作为电气安装过程的一部分，取得电气服务部（DES）的型式认可或验收。文莱标准局（DSN，即Jabatan Standard Brunei，隶属财政和经济部）是国家标准机构（在某些情况下亦称NSC），负责文莱国家标准。截至2026年6月，未发现DSN/NSC专门针对电动汽车充电接口的认证方案。出口商在进口前应与DES及当地持牌电气承包商协调，确定具体充电桩型式认可或合格评定文件要求。
summary.zht: 進口至汶萊的電氣設備（包括電動汽車充電接口和EVSE整機）須作為電氣安裝過程的一部分，取得電氣服務部（DES）的型式認可或驗收。汶萊標準局（DSN，即Jabatan Standard Brunei，隸屬財政和經濟部）是國家標準機構（在某些情況下亦稱NSC），負責汶萊國家標準。截至2026年6月，未發現DSN/NSC專門針對電動汽車充電接口的認證方案。出口商在進口前應與DES及當地持牌電氣承包商協調，確定具體充電樁型式認可或合格評定文件要求。

standards_or_laws: Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Development, Brunei — electrical installation approval authority
Department of Standards Brunei (DSN / NSC), Ministry of Finance and Economy — national standards body
Brunei Electricity Order (Cap. 165) — framework for electrical installation licensing and approval
IEC 62196-2 / IEC 62196-3 — connector safety and dimensional standards (IEC baseline for DES assessment)

summary.en: China EV charger connectors and EVSE assemblies are certified under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C) scheme where applicable, backed by GB/T 20234 and GB/T 18487 test evidence. CCC certification and GB/T test reports are not recognised by DES or DSN/NSC as a Brunei conformity substitute. Exporters must obtain Brunei-specific DES acceptance documentation rather than relying on CCC alone.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩接口和EVSE整机在适用时通过中国强制认证（CCC/3C）方案认证，依据GB/T 20234和GB/T 18487测试证据。CCC认证和GB/T测试报告不被DES或DSN/NSC认可为文莱合格评定替代凭证。出口商须取得文莱专项DES验收文件，不能仅依赖CCC。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁接口和EVSE整機在適用時通過中國強制認證（CCC/3C）方案認證，依據GB/T 20234和GB/T 18487測試證據。CCC認證和GB/T測試報告不被DES或DSN/NSC認可為汶萊合格評定替代憑證。出口商須取得汶萊專項DES驗收文件，不能僅依賴CCC。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) — China Compulsory Certification for EV charger connectors and EVSE (not recognised in Brunei)

gap.en: Exporters must: (1) engage a Brunei licensed electrical contractor familiar with DES requirements for EV charging equipment; (2) prepare IEC 62196-2 / IEC 62196-3 test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory as the technical evidence base for DES acceptance; (3) confirm whether DSN/NSC has published any EV-charger-specific certification scheme as of the date of import — no such scheme was confirmed as of 2026-06-14; (4) not assume CCC or GB/T reports alone satisfy DES or customs requirements.
gap.zh: 出口商须：(1) 委托熟悉电动汽车充电设备DES要求的文莱持牌电气承包商；(2) 提供ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 62196-2 / IEC 62196-3测试报告，作为DES验收的技术证据基础；(3) 在进口时确认DSN/NSC是否已发布电动汽车充电桩专项认证方案——截至2026年6月14日，未发现此类方案；(4) 不得假设仅凭CCC或GB/T报告即可满足DES或海关要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須：(1) 委託熟悉電動汽車充電設備DES要求的汶萊持牌電氣承包商；(2) 提供ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 62196-2 / IEC 62196-3測試報告，作為DES驗收的技術證據基礎；(3) 在進口時確認DSN/NSC是否已發布電動汽車充電樁專項認證方案——截至2026年6月14日，未發現此類方案；(4) 不得假設僅憑CCC或GB/T報告即可滿足DES或海關要求。

mandatory_status.target: DES type approval or acceptance is required for electrical equipment installation in Brunei; no confirmed dedicated EV-charger connector certification scheme under DSN/NSC as of 2026-06; coordinate with DES and a licensed electrical contractor
mandatory_status.cn: China CCC is mandatory for applicable EV charger products in China; not recognised in Brunei as a conformity substitute

source.publisher: Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Development, Brunei Darussalam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed Brunei-specific EV-charger connector certification scheme under DSN/NSC was found as of 2026-06-14. DES coordination via a licensed electrical contractor is required for all EV charger installations. IEC 62196 test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory are the appropriate technical evidence base. Do not assume CCC or GB/T reports alone are sufficient.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年6月14日，未发现DSN/NSC专门针对电动汽车充电桩接口的认证方案。所有电动汽车充电桩安装均须通过持牌电气承包商与DES协调。ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 62196测试报告是适当的技术证据基础。不得假设仅凭CCC或GB/T报告即已充分。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年6月14日，未發現DSN/NSC專門針對電動汽車充電樁接口的認證方案。所有電動汽車充電樁安裝均須通過持牌電氣承包商與DES協調。ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 62196測試報告是適當的技術證據基礎。不得假設僅憑CCC或GB/T報告即已充分。
